mapper.update:
/* 알람 수정 */ update tb_alarm set
alarm_cfm_yn = #{alarmCfmYn},
alarm_cfm_date = #{alarmCfmDate},
alarm_cfm_uid = #{alarmCfmUid},
alarm_act_yn = #{alarmActYn},
alarm_note = #{alarmNote},
mod_date = now() where alarm_idx = #{alarmIdx }
mapper.select: /* 알람 SMS수신자 목록 조회 */ select a.sms_user_idx, a.site_id, b.site_name, a.name as user_name, replace(mobile, '-', '') as mobile from tb_sms_user a, tb_site b where a.site_id = b.site_id and a.del_yn = 'N' and a.site_id = #{siteId }

/* 알람 수신자 등록가능 이름 목록 조회 */ select user_idx, user_id, user_pw, user_type, main_user_idx, main_user_yn, auth_type, lang_type, comp_idx, co_name, co_tel, co_email, psn_name, psn_dept, psn_tel, psn_mobile, psn_email, note, site_grp_idx, site_id, del_yn, reg_uid, reg_date, mod_uid, mod_date from tb_user where del_yn = 'N'
and site_grp_idx = ( select site_grp_idx from tb_site where 1=1 and site_id = #{siteId } )
mapper.insert: /* 알람 수신자 등록 */ insert into tb_sms_user ( site_id, /*사이트ID*/ `name`, /*이름*/ mobile, /*휴대폰번호*/ del_yn, reg_uid, reg_date ) values ( #{siteId }, #{addresseeName }, #{mobile }, 'N', #{regUid }, now() )
mapper.update: /* 알람 수신자 삭제 */ update tb_sms_user set del_yn = 'Y', mod_uid = #{modUid }, mod_date = now() where 1=1 and sms_user_idx = #{smsUserIdx }
